sizing_rule.note: Scale position size inversely to annualized historical volatility (20-day lookback). Formula: Annualized HV = historical_volatility × √(periods per year). Input into Black-Scholes model to inform sizing. Author does not specify optimal_f value, Kelly fraction, or max drawdown tolerance.

source_rule_text: Use historical volatility calculated over a specific period (e.g., 20 days) annualized and input into the Black-Scholes option pricing model to inform position sizing decisions.
